# preferredDevice

**Instance Property**

Returns a device object that the client application should select when it launches.

## Declaration

```swift
var preferredDevice: ICDevice? { get }
```

## Discussion

If the client application that calls this method is the autolaunch application associated with a device, and that device is the last one attached (through USB, FireWire, or network), then that device is the preferred device.

Call this method in the implementation of [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceBrowserDelegate/deviceBrowser(_:didAdd:moreComing:)] if the value of `moreComing` is `false`; or in the implementation of [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICDeviceBrowserDelegate/deviceBrowserDidEnumerateLocalDevices(_:)].
title: preferredDevice
